notes: The game crashes on the intro video but it's possible to skip the intro by pressing U until the menu shows up. The game only runs properly at 720p windowed mode. Also the game only runs properly at 60hz. I was able to use the PS4 controller in wireless mode without any issues.
title: Arcana Heart 3 LOVE MAX!!!!!

notes: The game still has the same issues affecting it from five months ago. Notably, playing on a 4K display is very uncomfortable because the resolution cannot be increased larger than 1280×720. When you close the game, it will sometimes create zombie processes that cannot be closed, preventing you from launching the game again. Playing in lobbies sometimes prevents you from connecting to other players for the rest of the session. Playing on a fightstick works well enough and the intro crash can be prevented by mashing buttons during the logos. Other than that, performance and offline play is fine.
title: Arcana Heart 3 LOVE MAX!!!!!
